Perfect for sidewalks, driveways, and outdoor rides, this stroll 'n trike brings memory-making fun to toddlers and kids ages 1-5. Title: JMMD 6 in 1 Toddler Bike with Push Handle for Kids 18-60 Months, 12" Foldable Balance Bike with Training Wheels, Pedals, Brakes, Kickstand, Push Tricycle Toddler Gift & Toys for Boy & Girl
Features: GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD: No need to buy multiple kid bikes! This 6-in-1 convertible design easily transforms from a parent-push trike to a toddler tricycle, balance bike, toddler bike and more — perfectly suited for ages 18 to 60 months. It’s the only bike your child will need through their early years. | ADJUSTABLE STEERING HANDLE FOR SAFE CONTROL: The parent push handle rotates 135° for easy control of the toddler push bike’s speed and direction, helping protect your child from tipping or losing balance. It can also be adjusted to match parents’ height for comfortable guiding. Both the handlebar and seat are height-adjustable, and it comes with a seat extension rod for a perfect fit for kids of different heights. | SAFETY FIRST, ALWAYS: Built with parents’ peace of mind in mind. Equipped with an aluminum alloy frame, 12" all-terrain puncture-proof rubber wheels, a hand brake, and 60° steering limiter to prevent sudden turns. The gear-driven, chain-free system keeps your child safe while offering smoother control. Every detail of JMMD kids bicycle is designed for stability, safety, and comfort. | EASY TO ASSEMBLE & FOLD: Arrives 95% pre-assembled — just attach the handlebar, seat, push rod, and pedals, and it’s ready to ride. With one press of the red button under the frame, the toddler bike with training wheels folds instantly, making it easy to carry or store in your car trunk. Setup takes just minutes — no tools, no stress, just fun. Perfect for travel and family outings. | THE PERFECT GIFT FOR GROWING KIDS: Designed with training wheels and a kickstand, JMMD 6-in-1 toddler bicycle offers a smooth and safe transition from tricycle to balance bike to real bike. It helps your little one build balance and confidence step by step — from guided rides to independent adventures. A thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or first-bike surprises — more than a toy, it’s a memory that grows with your child.
